infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs location access to track deliveries.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs background location access to track deliveries even when the app is closed.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location for delivery tracking.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location for delivery tracking.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use your location for delivery tracking.
